calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judy Hitchcock for and with Aleksandr Shapiro (Petitioner). Valeriy Volostnykh (Respondent). Valeriy Kleyman (Russian Interpreter for Mr. Bolostnykh). Ethelbert Ogbuehi (Russian Interpreter for Mr. Shapiro).

The Court informed both parties that they are entitled to have a Certified Court Interpreter.
Both parties agreed to using the Non-Certified Interpreters. Mr. Kleyman and Mr. Ogbuehi were sworn as interpreters. Mr. Shapiro and Mr. Volostnykh were sworn through the interpreters.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court feels that the facts support re-issuance of the restraining order for a three year period on the terms that the Court previously issued the temporary restraining order; that the evidence supports the conclusion that Mr. Volostnykh did make threats to Mr. Shapiro and did slash Mr. Shapiro's tires on one occasion. The Court is not convinced that Mr. Volostnykh intentionally violated the restrianing order and reminded Mr. Volostnykh of the importance of obeying the restraining order. Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Aleksandr Shapiro and his vehicle: 3 yards stay away from the protected person and his apartment when on the premises of 255 Woodside Ave., San Francisco, CA., or his car if it is parked within 100 yards of the premises. Petitioner's exhibit were returned in open Court.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy Personal Property of, or disturb the peace of the person. Contact the person either directly or indirectly, in any way, including, but not limited to, in person , by telephone, in writing, by public or private mail, by interoffice mail, by e-Mail, by text messaging, by fax, or by other electronic means. Take Any Action to Obtain the Addresses or Location.

No Guns or Other Firearms/Turn In or Sell Guns or Firearms.

Expires March 28, 2015.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sonia Wong CSR #11288. Clerk: Ella Yip/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Text Ruling
